title: Combine Conditions
description: Welcome to Rank Challenge. Sales wants active users from a couple of key regions. Return `id`, `name` and `country` from `users` where the account is active **AND** the country is either `'US'` **OR** `'CA'`. Use parentheses so the OR is grouped correctly.
objectives: Use WHERE with AND and OR
Group the OR conditions with parentheses
hints: Combine boolean conditions with the AND and OR keywords.
Wrap the two country options in parentheses so AND binds correctly.

files.content:
-- TODO: keep active accounts located in either of the two target regions
SELECT id, name, country FROM users;

parseRules.failMessage: Offer the two regions with OR.
